title: Add session cleanup utility
description: Create `cleanExpiredSessions(store: SessionStore, maxAgeMs: number): number` in `src/auth/session-cleanup.ts` that removes sessions older than maxAgeMs (based on createdAt) and returns the count of removed sessions. Include co-located tests in `session-cleanup.test.ts`.
existing_patterns: src/utils/debounce.ts - single-function utility module with co-located .test.ts
src/auth/session-store.ts - Session interface with id, userId, token, refreshToken, expiresAt, refreshExpiresAt, createdAt fields; revoke() method available for removing sessions
src/auth/session-store.test.ts - uses vitest with beforeEach setup, vi.useFakeTimers() for time-based tests
